recommendations.title: Cube 2: Hypercube
recommendations.overview: Eight strangers awaken with no memory, in a puzzling cube-shaped room where the laws of physics do not always apply.

recommendations.title: Haunting of the Queen Mary

recommendations.title: Lifted

recommendations.title: Circle

recommendations.title: Robot Monster
recommendations.overview: Ro-Man, an alien robot who greatly resembles a gorilla in a diving helmet, is sent to earth to destroy all human life. Ro-Man falls in love with one of the last six remaining humans, and struggles to understand how his programming can instruct him to

recommendations.title: Rakka
recommendations.overview: A story of broken humanity following the invasion of a technologically superior alien species. Bleak, harrowing, and unrelenting, the humans must find enough courage to go on fighting.

recommendations.title: Alive in Joburg
recommendations.overview: A documentary-style short film about the arrival of an alien spaceship over Johannesburg, South Africa.

recommendations.title: The Return

recommendations.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Movie
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious stranger arrives from the future with a dire warning, Leo is forced to rise and lead his brothers, Raph, Donnie, and Mikey in a fight to save the world from a terrifying alien species.
